## Contributor Checklist

- [ ] User-facing docs and examples are accurate.
- [ ] Generated OKF output is deterministic where this PR changes generation.
- [ ] Validation errors are actionable where this PR changes validation.
- [ ] Crawling changes respect robots.txt, rate limits, and source access rules.
- [ ] No credentials, cookies, private docs, or tokens are included.
